title: APIv2: No events when deleting image
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**
When I listen on events through APIv2 and delete image I don't get any event for it. I get it later on when I do some other action, that triggers some event. It feels like events are not flushed/sent, but are only queued.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
1. `sudo curl --unix-socket /run/podman/podman.sock http://d/v1.24/events` listen on events
2. `sudo podman run -dit fedora bash`
3. `sudo podman rmi -f eb7134a03cd6` (`eb7134a03cd6` is the fedora image that was used in ^)

**Describe the results you received:**
Checking events (step 1. was running the whole time) I don't see any about the image being removed, just about the container being stopped (but not removed).

```
{"Type":"image","Action":"pull","Actor":{"ID":"","Attributes":{"containerExitCode":"0","image":"","name":""}},"scope":"local","time":1592472737,"timeNano":1592472737248919025}
{"Type":"container","Action":"create","Actor":{"ID":"5f22309892b25090082bb6db24ad937820e6838b813c6453cae87ee299af4ed2","Attributes":{"containerExitCode":"0","image":"registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:latest","name":"keen_pike"}},"scope":"local","time":1592472737,"timeNano":1592472737274347288}
{"Type":"container","Action":"init","Actor":{"ID":"5f22309892b25090082bb6db24ad937820e6838b813c6453cae87ee299af4ed2","Attributes":{"containerExitCode":"0","image":"registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:latest","name":"keen_pike"}},"scope":"local","time":1592472737,"timeNano":1592472737698748338}

---------- Now I run step 3. ------------------

{"Type":"container","Action":"start","Actor":{"ID":"5f22309892b25090082bb6db24ad937820e6838b813c6453cae87ee299af4ed2","Attributes":{"containerExitCode":"0","image":"registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:latest","name":"keen_pike"}},"scope":"local","time":1592472737,"timeNano":1592472737752666694}
{"Type":"container","Action":"stop","Actor":{"ID":"5f22309892b25090082bb6db24ad937820e6838b813c6453cae87ee299af4ed2","Attributes":{"containerExitCode":"0","image":"registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:latest","name":"keen_pike"}},"scope":"local","time":1592472775,"timeNano":1592472775559431606}
{"Type":"container","Action":"died","Actor":{"ID":"5f22309892b25090082bb6db24ad937820e6838b813c6453cae87ee299af4ed2","Attributes":{"containerExitCode":"0","image":"registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:latest","name":"keen_pike"}},"scope":"local","time":1592472775,"timeNano":1592472775589530005}
```

I get the following two messages when I do some other action (like `sudo podman pull fedora`):
```
{"Type":"container","Action":"remove","Actor":{"ID":"5f22309892b25090082bb6db24ad937820e6838b813c6453cae87ee299af4ed2","Attributes":{"containerExitCode":"0","image":"registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:latest","name":"keen_pike"}},"scope":"local","time":1592472775,"timeNano":1592472775825801453}
{"Type":"image","Action":"remove","Actor":{"ID":"eb7134a03cd6bd8a3de99c16cf174d66ad2d93724bac3307795efcd8aaf914c5","Attributes":{"containerExitCode":"0","image":"","name":"registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:latest"}},"scope":"local","time":1592472776,"timeNano":1592472776034254461}
```

**Describe the results you expected:**
I would get all events the first time.

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:      2.0.0-rc6
API Version:  1
Go Version:   go1.14.3
Built:        Thu Jan  1 01:00:00 1970
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**


comments.body:
Possibly reproducible when more then one listener is active.
1. `sudo curl --unix-socket /run/podman/podman.sock http://d/v1.24/events` in one terminal
2. `sudo curl --unix-socket /run/podman/podman.sock http://d/v1.24/events` in second terminal
3. `sudo curl --unix-socket /run/podman/podman.sock http://d/v1.24/events` in third terminal

Do steps 2 and 3 and then one terminal gets all events, but others don't.
